commit.subject: LU-12742 Test revert to find a culprit 1
commit.message:
LU-12742 Test revert to find a culprit 1

Revert "LU-9325 ptlrpc: replace simple_strtol with kstrtol"

This reverts commit 8f37d64b6bc9111ff20ffb0bd22daf8fb9c8c159.

Change-Id: I17e0a24d16b44d1d81fb5fce04e2c4487c252271
Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity,sanity,sanity,sanity,sanity,sanity,sanity,sanity,sanity,sanity
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn
Signed-off-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
